atomicity.message: Staged payload implements only the OXP prompts command API and JSON contract for project-readiness-kit-oxp-prompts-command-api-6lv.

conditions.message: Staged Go prompt-command payload is formatted and passes focused plus full Go tests in an isolated staged-slice worktree.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 regenerated packets for staged payload sha256:765cda42017ef7921e4a58ad15152c745ddda2f0e18736c2fc549158006262aa, confirmed git diff --cached --check and gofmt had no issues, and ran focused tests plus go test ./... in an isolated staged-slice worktree.

conditions.message: Prompt metadata and rendering behavior are centralized, with CLI code acting as a thin adapter.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2808 inspected staged prompt_bank.go and main.go and found prompt metadata/rendering centralized in the backpressure prompt-bank API with list/show delegating to that API, plus package and CLI tests covering the behavior.

conditions.message: The command cannot earn superficial success by confusing canonical templates with verifier packets or executing shell-looking variable content.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2808 inspected the staged prompts command/help and prompt rendering, confirmed required-variable and unknown-prompt failures, and reproduced hostile variable rendering as literal text.

conditions.message: New prompt-bank behavior and CLI surfaces have direct focused tests.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 inspected staged prompts_test.go and prompt_bank_test.go and confirmed coverage for list/show JSON, required-variable errors, unknown prompts, literal hostile rendering, stable listing, and robot help distinction; focused tests passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload satisfies the current bead contract and the claimed evidence reproduced on a staged-only snapshot.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2808 checked the bead acceptance criteria, reproduced the staged payload hash, and confirmed focused tests, direct CLI probes, git diff --cached --check, and go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: Verifier response records reproducible staged hash, path set, isolated test commands, and direct CLI observations.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 recorded packet reproduction, exact four-file staged path set, isolated staged-slice worktree evidence, CLI observations, and full go test ./... for payload sha256:765cda42017ef7921e4a58ad15152c745ddda2f0e18736c2fc549158006262aa.

conditions.message: Payload stays within the list/show embedded prompt API and JSON contract.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2808 confirmed the staged path set is only main.go, prompts_test.go, prompt_bank.go, and prompt_bank_test.go; no scaffold, export, docs/prompts, agent-mail, NTM, pane, dependency, or manifest files are staged.

conditions.message: The prompt list/show implementation is read-only and does not create prompt files, alter repo config, spawn processes, or trigger orchestration.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 inspected staged main.go and prompt_bank.go and found stdout/JSON rendering only, with no filesystem, git, process, network, mail, pane, or NTM mutation path; prompt list/show did not create repo-local prompt files.

conditions.message: Prompt output data is stable and constrained.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 confirmed prompts list --json output, exact show --json key set of body/name/variables/version, literal hostile-value rendering, required-variable error text, unknown-prompt valid-name guidance, and tests asserting the same contract.

conditions.message: Hostile variable content is treated as literal text and no shell or external execution boundary is added.
evidence: BrightOwl Agent Mail 2808 inspected prompt_bank.go and found strings.ReplaceAll rendering only, no shell/template execution/eval/subprocess/network/credential/filesystem path, and hostile values preserved literally by tests and direct probes.

conditions.message: The staged payload contains CLI command/help/JSON behavior and in-memory prompt-bank code only; no visual surface is introduced.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 confirmed staged paths are only CLI and backpressure Go files, with no browser, CSS, canvas, TUI layout, screenshots, VHS assets, HTML, or visual rendering code.

conditions.message: Implementation is bounded to static embedded prompt data, linear scans over a tiny prompt/variable set, and no filesystem/network/process calls.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 inspected prompt_bank.go, confirmed one prompt with three variables from prompts list --json, and ran full go test ./... in the isolated staged-slice worktree.

conditions.message: The new command exposes prompt text but does not spawn agents, send mail, move panes, mutate scaffolds, or treat prompt text as verifier evidence.
evidence: ScarletMarsh Agent Mail 2810 inspected robot/human help and staged code, confirming burpvalve prompts is distinct from burpvalve verifier prompts and contains no agent-mail, NTM, pane, native-subagent, or verifier-submit call path.
